Review Draft: Proposed enums for TLS config split (for literal/value review)

```go
// TLSProvisioningMode controls how server certificate material is sourced.
// This enum is about certificate provisioning, not client certificate auth policy.
type TLSProvisioningMode string

const (
    // Static: do not generate; use pre-provided cert chain and key.
    TLSProvisioningModeStatic TLSProvisioningMode = "static"
    // Issued: generate leaf cert, but sign with provided CA cert/key.
    TLSProvisioningModeIssued TLSProvisioningMode = "issued"
    // AutoGenerated: generate CA hierarchy and leaf cert automatically.
    TLSProvisioningModeAutoGenerated TLSProvisioningMode = "auto-generated"
)
```

```go
// TLSClientCertPolicy controls TLS-layer client certificate request/require/verification behavior.
// This enum is about client certificate auth policy, not certificate provisioning.
type TLSClientCertPolicy string

const (
    // NoClientCert: do not ask for client cert; do not validate.
    TLSClientCertPolicyNoClientCert TLSClientCertPolicy = "no-client-cert"
    // RequestClientCert: ask for client cert; do not require; do not validate.
    TLSClientCertPolicyRequestClientCert TLSClientCertPolicy = "request-client-cert"
    // VerifyClientCertIfGiven: ask for client cert; do not require; validate if provided.
    TLSClientCertPolicyVerifyClientCertIfGiven TLSClientCertPolicy = "verify-client-cert-if-given"
    // RequireAnyClientCert: ask for client cert; require one; do not validate chain/trust.
    TLSClientCertPolicyRequireAnyClientCert TLSClientCertPolicy = "require-any-client-cert"
    // RequireAndVerifyClientCert: ask for client cert; require one; validate chain/trust.
    TLSClientCertPolicyRequireAndVerifyClientCert TLSClientCertPolicy = "require-and-verify-client-cert"
)
```

Security note for review: RequestClientCert and RequireAnyClientCert are weaker than validation modes and require compensating controls if used in production.

Legacy runtime labels (listener/client-cert policy domain): TLSModeOff, TLSModeOn, TLSModeMixed
.\docs\ENG-HANDBOOK.md
.\docs\tls-structure.md
.\test-output\config-review.txt

Provisioning enum family (certificate material sourcing domain): TLSModeStatic, TLSModeMixed, TLSModeAuto

Current listener mTLS policy wiring (hardcoded RequireAndVerifyClientCert when CA file is present)
